title: Bring Azure innovation to your hybrid environments with Azure Arc
summary: Learn how to work with Azure Arc enabled servers, data services and Kubernetes.

sections.title: Bring Azure innovation to your hybrid environments with Azure Arc
sections.summary: Learn how to work with Azure Arc enabled servers, data services and Kubernetes.

lessons.title: Plan and deploy Azure Arc-enabled servers at scale
lessons.content_md:
Understand the capabilities and architecture of Azure Arc-enabled servers. Learn how to test and select the right deployment method for your machines. Finally, adopt best practices and advanced security considerations for Azure Arc-enabled servers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-deploy-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and deploy Azure Arc-enabled servers at scale

lessons.title: Secure your hybrid and multicloud machines by using Azure Arc-enabled servers
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the benefits of and how to onboard Azure Arc-enabled servers to Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Microsoft Defender for Servers, and Microsoft Sentinel.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure your hybrid and multicloud machines by using Azure Arc-enabled servers

lessons.title: Monitor your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers
lessons.content_md:
Understand the monitoring capabilities of Azure Arc-enabled servers. Learn about the benefits of and how to onboard Azure Arc-enabled servers to Azure Logs and Metrics, VM Insights, and Azure Monitor Alerts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers

lessons.title: Govern your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers
lessons.content_md:
Understand the governance capabilities of Azure Arc-enabled servers. Learn about the benefits of and how to onboard Azure Arc-enabled servers to Azure Policy, Azure Automation, and Azure Automanage.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/govern-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Govern your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Bring Azure innovation to your hybrid environments with Azure Arc
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Bring Azure innovation to your hybrid environments with Azure Arc**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
